name: pi-extension-monorepo
description: Monorepo for standalone pi extensions published as separate npm packages.

scripts.verify: pnpm run biome:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run check
scripts.publish:dry-run: pnpm run verify && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run verify && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:ask-user-question: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-ask-user-question publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:auto-name: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-auto-name publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:clipboard: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-clipboard publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:codex-fast-mode: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-codex-fast-mode publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:delayed-action: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-delayed-action publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:generative-ui: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-generative-ui publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:idle-screensaver: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-idle-screensaver publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:todo-write: pnpm run verify && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-todo-write publish --access public --no-git-checks
